title: prunus × lannesiana f. moutan
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. moutan, also known as Moutan or Paeonia Moutan, is a flowering plant that is a cross between Prunus mume and Prunus persica, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Moutan include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as arthritis and high blood pressure. Moutan is often prepared for consumption as a tea or herbal extract, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to create ointments, salves, and other topical preparations.
